questions.text: You focus on the big picture rather than details.
Logic is more important than heart in decisions.
You prefer having a detailed plan.
You feel drained after spending time with a large group of people.
You prefer to follow established traditions rather than invent new ways.
You highly value emotional harmony in your relationships.
You prefer to leave things open-ended and adapt as you go.
You are usually the one to start conversations with new people.
You often find yourself daydreaming about abstract concepts or the future.
You find it easy to remain detached when discussing controversial topics.
You feel anxious when you don't have a clear schedule for your day.
You prefer quiet weekends at home over going to busy parties.
You lean heavily on facts, data, and past experiences to solve problems.
You prioritize people's feelings over absolute scientific or objective truth.
You often wait until the last minute or deadline to finish tasks.
